description: Example AI responses from POST /notes/{id}/ai/* endpoints. Provider is 'ollama' when a local Ollama server is reachable, otherwise 'fallback' (deterministic rules).

result.summary: We need to ship the MVP by Friday.
The team plans a phased MVP release by Friday, with testing and documentation as immediate follow-ups.
bullets: Open tasks: API tests and docs

draft_override.note: POST body may include unsaved content/title; AI uses draft text without persisting the note first.
